d: Lumont selects a tile in range and charges at it, knocking enemies in his path back toward the selected tile. When Lumont reaches the selected tile, he deals [[240%]]<ATK> damage to all adjacent enemies and [[taunts]] them for [[3]]s. Lumont is [[unaffected]] while casting the skill.
Increases damage to [[260%]]<ATK>.
[[Taunts]] enemies for [[4]]s.
Increases damage to [[280%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[300%]]<ATK>.

Lumont gains a shield from the Totem Ward that blocks [[450%]]<ATK> damage for [[12]]s. For every adjacent enemy, the shield value is increased by [[30%]]. He also increases Phys DEF of [[2]] closest allies by [[30%]] for [[7]]s.
Increases the shield value by [[35%]] for every adjacent enemy.
Increases the shield value by [[40%]] for every adjacent enemy.
Increases the shield value by [[45%]] for every adjacent enemy.
Lumont stomps the ground, dealing [[240%]]<ATK> damage to adjacent enemies and stunning them for [[1]]s.
Increases damage to [[260%]]<ATK>.
Reduces this skill's cooldown by [[1]]s for every enemy hit.
Increases damage to [[280%]]<ATK>.
Lumont increases his Haste by [[9]] during battle. His Haste is increased by an extra [[6]] when there are at least 2 enemies nearby.
Lumont increases his Haste by [[12]] during battle. His Haste is increased by an extra [[8]] when there are at least 2 enemies nearby.
Lumont increases his Haste by [[15]] during battle. His Haste is increased by an extra [[10]] when there are at least 2 enemies nearby.

Lumont slams the ground with totem 3 times after receiving damage equal to [[40%]] of his max HP, dealing [[150%]]<ATK> damage to enemies within 1, 2, and 3 tiles in order and reducing their ATK by [[25%]] for [[6]]s. His 3rd slam also knocks the enemies hit into the air. Lumont is [[unaffected]] while casting the skill.
Gains an extra skill attempt when a battle starts or an ally is defeated for the first time.
Increases damage to [[180%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[210%]]<ATK>.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, when HP drops below [[60%]], reduces damage taken by [[15%]] and recovers [[3%]] of lost HP per second for [[8]]s. Triggers up to once every [[20]]s.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 Crit Resist, 15 Ranged DEF, 10 Crit DMG DEF.

d: Lumont recovers [[7%]]<HP> HP per second while shielded by Totem Ward.
